details: Contributed to an enterprise portfolio dashboard using React for role-based tracking of application performance and reliability metrics.
Collaborated on Python-based backend APIs and Amazon DocumentDB to ingest and process metrics from multiple cloud and monitoring tools.
Built complex UI features including interactive trend graphs, advanced date filtering, and automated PDF/CSV report generation.
Supported automated AWS workflows that calculate and refresh application health scores across key operational pillars.
Contributed to the development of a net banking platform, focusing on security enhancements and seamless user experience.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to implement responsive design features and optimize application performance.
Integrated REST APIs to enable dynamic data interaction between frontend and backend systems.
Built scalable React components and improved maintainability across the application.
